description_long: This is a large, industrial excavator mounted on a flatbed railcar, commonly used for heavy construction and earthmoving tasks in urban environments. The excavator features a robust, articulated mono boom with hydraulic cylinders, a spacious operator cab positioned on the left side, and a standard digging bucket attached at the end of the arm. The undercarriage consists of wide steel tracks, providing stability and traction on rough terrain. The body is predominantly painted in a tan color with black and gray accents, and visible hydraulic lines run along the boom and arm. The flatbed railcar is equipped with tie-down cables securing the excavator, and the entire assembly is designed for transport between job sites.
description: A tan and black tracked excavator with a mono boom and standard digging bucket, secured on a flatbed railcar for transport. Features a left-side cab, visible hydraulic lines, and robust steel tracks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bucket, boom, and the width of the tracks, with the cab partially visible behind the arm.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the boom, arm, and bucket, as well as the left-side cab and the excavator's position on the railcar.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the cab, engine compartment, and the rear of the flatbed railcar.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the right side of the excavator, the tracks, and the hydraulic lines along the boom.
